scripts.pack: npm run build:ts && npm run control-ui:build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run align:openclaw && npm run build:ts && npm run control-ui:build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder
scripts.dist:installer: npm run align:openclaw && npm run build:ts && npm run control-ui:build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.dist:portable: npm run align:openclaw && npm run build:ts && npm run control-ui:build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win portable
